title: phyD-Spaceflight Analysis: Systems Biology of Arabidopsis thaliana Germination
description: This repository provides a comprehensive systems biology investigation of Arabidopsis thaliana germination under deep-space related stress. It integrates transcriptomic datasets from root microgravity (OSD-120), shoot microgravity (OSD-678), and Galactic Cosmic Radiation (OSD-658) with Null Magnetic Field (NMF) analysis. The study employs tissue-specific modeling, single-cell atlas projection, and Biomni-based integration to characterize the regulatory mechanisms perturbed during spaceflight.
